summary: Determines whether a supplied value names a known content type and returns its primary associated file extension, otherwise returning false.
signature_intent: Accepts one value and returns either a string file extension or boolean false.
behavior: Rejects missing, empty, or non-string input with false.
Extracts the relevant content-type identifier from a valid string input.
Matches identifiers case-insensitively against known extension entries.
Returns the first extension associated with a recognized identifier.
Returns false when no known extensions are available for the identifier.
edge_cases: Falsy strings are rejected with false.
Non-string values are rejected with false.
Recognized identifiers with no extensions return false.
